title: amphoricarpos autariatus
intro: Amphoricarpos autariatus, also known as the Chinese spikenard or Chinese snakeroot, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Amphoricarpos autariatus include reducing fever, treating snake bites, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
